String: While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or when possessing maximum stacks of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Hearts<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, swapping to the opposite element will allow you to execute <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or when possessing maximum stacks of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Hearts<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, swapping to the opposite element will allow you to execute <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
